videoSnippet.title: Sharpening His Blade for the Candidates || Fabi vs Abhimanyu Mishra || The American Cup 2026
videoSnippet.description:

Caruana, Fabiano (2795) - Mishra, Abhimanyu (2629)
The American Cup 2026 (Chess.com) [01-01] 2026.03.05
E60 King's Indian, 3.Nf3

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 g6 3.Nf3 Bg7 4.e3 O-O 5.Be2 c5 6.d5 d6 7.Nc3 e6 8.O-O exd5 9.cxd5 Re8 10.Nd2 Na6 11.e4 Nc7 12.a4 b6 13.f3 Qe7 14.Re1 Nd7 15.Nb5 Nxb5 16.Bxb5 a6 17.Bc6 Rb8 18.f4 Rd8 19.Qe2 Nf6 20.Nf3 Bb7 21.Bxb7 Qxb7 22.Bd2 Re8 23.Qd3 b5 24.Bc3 c4 25.Qc2 Re7 26.axb5 axb5 27.Bd4 Nd7 28.Kh1 Rbe8 29.Bf2 Nf6 30.Ra7 Qb8 31.Rxe7 Rxe7 32.e5 Nxd5 33.Qd2 Nb6 34.exd6 Rxe1+ 35.Qxe1 Qxd6 36.Qe8+ Qf8 37.Qxb5 Nc8 38.Ne5 Nd6 39.Qd5 Qb8 40.h3 Qc7 41.Bb6 Qe7 42.Bc5 Bf8 43.Bxd6 Qxd6 44.Qxf7+ Kh8 45.Qxc4 Qd2 46.Qc3 Qxc3 47.bxc3 Kg7 48.g4 Bd6 49.Nd3 h5 50.Kg2 hxg4 51.hxg4 Kf6 52.Kf3 Ke6 53.Ke4 Bc7 54.c4 Bd6 55.g5 Bc7 56.Ne5
